title: Hydrogen Infrastructure: Port of South Louisiana Tenders First E-Methanol Fueling Barge
content: Port of South Louisiana is in the works: a cutting-edge hydrogen fueling barge ready to pump e-methanol and other green fuels straight into ships, totally changing the game for marine refueling.The port has put out a call for bids on a custom-built vessel designed to carry Grade C flammable liquids. At its heart is e-methanolâ€”a synthetic marine fuel crafted by combining green hydrogen from renewable electrolysis with captured COâ‚‚. In plain terms, this barge turns the river into a refueling superhighway. Itâ€™s powered by a Build Back Better Regional Challenge grant from the U.S. Economic Development Administration.
author: Analysts Account
